---
title: "Matilda Blanche Gibbs"
---

## Matilda Blanche Gibbs

**Dates:** (1817/8- 24 Sept 1887)

**Maiden name:** (Crawley-Boevey)

### Description

philanthropist, cousin of CMY

### Biography

She was known as Blanche. Third daughter of Sir Thomas Crawley-Boevey 3rd Bt. she married (1 Aug 1839) William Gibbs (1790-1875) of Tyntesfield.  She was second cousin to CMY, her paternal grandfather being brother of WCY's mother.

### Letters

- [To Helena Mary Heathcote, May 5 1898](../letters/3370_To_Helena_Mary_Heathcote.html)
- Letter from [May 1894]
- Letter from St. Michael [29 September 1887]
- Letter from May 1st 1876
- Letter from [check 1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
